Sirius:
激活后，小天狼星会召唤具有更多生命值并造成更多伤害的暗影。超充能暗影的生命值是格斗者对应物的 85%，造成的伤害是格斗者对应物的 70%。他还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==提示==

* 如果您正在玩[[Brawl Ball]]，请使用Super 来踢球，因为它的充电速度非常快。请记住，您至少需要一个活跃的影子才能使用超级。
* 尝试在保存三个暗影时使用天狼星的超充能来创建三个强大的暗影，因为超充能仅对在其持续时间内召唤的暗影生效。
* 当你受到伏击时，使用小天狼星的暗影大师小工具，这样你就会有很多暗影来抵御突然袭击。
* [[Janet]] 暗影不知道如何发起攻击，所以尽量避免从她那里收集暗影，在下次攻击收集暗影时攻击不同的对手。 
* 在茂密的地图中进行游戏时，您可以通过将阴影引导到您的重生位置来堆叠最多六个阴影。然后，当对手靠近时，使用他的暗影大师小工具进行突然袭击。
* 使用小天狼星的超级时，请注意像[[尼塔]]、[[塔拉]]、[[卡尔]]、[[Emz]]或[[佩妮]]这样的溅射伤害，因为它们仍然可以在几次攻击中伤害小天狼星并摧毁暗影。尤其是佩妮和埃姆兹对于小天狼星来说非常危险，因为他们的飞溅攻击可以消灭他的暗影，如果小天狼星使用它们作为盾牌，甚至可以干掉小天狼星本人。
* 小天狼星的生命值低迷和伤害相对较低，使得他在一对一的情况下很弱，所以在收集暗影时尽量与队友一起而不是单独行动。

Trunk:

*树干可以使用他们的主要攻击来获得短暂的速度提升，这在敌人试图逃跑时特别有用。
*特兰克的殖民地侦察星力量通常只应在[[洞穴搅拌]]或[[盛宴或饥荒]]等茂密地图中使用，在那里它将大大提高他们的表现。

Ziggy:
激活后，Ziggy 的下一个超级将在达到最大距离后返回。与大多数返回能力不同，风暴不会返回到他当前的位置，而是返回到 Ziggy 在达到最大距离时的位置。风暴的最长寿命实际上加倍，但不再有最短寿命。 Ziggy 还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==提示==
*除了他的“现在你看到我...小工具”之外，Ziggy 没有任何逃跑或防御选择。因此，尽量靠近可以防守你的队友，或者留在后线作为人群控制。 
*Ziggy 的 Super 是一种极其强大的人群控制来源，但可以通过移出其轨迹来轻松躲避。因此，瞄准对手被迫介入的咽喉要道。他的常规攻击也是如此。
*当对手追击您时，引导他们绕行并根据他们的速度稍微瞄准您的前方或后方。这样你就能够可靠地击中它们。
*主攻击不自动瞄准。主要攻击有很长的延迟，并且自动瞄准使击中敌人变得更加困难，因为射弹出现在斗殴者的中心。
*要使用“现在你看到我...”小工具逃离侵略性的争吵者，请务必在对手到达您之前激活它。这是因为与大多数防御性小工具不同，齐吉的小工具需要一些时间来激活（由于他的攻击延迟），这使他很容易受到高爆发的争吵者或具有惊人能力的争吵者的攻击，例如[[Bull]]，[[Buzz]]，[[Frank]]或[[Fang]]。

Mina:
激活后，米娜会制造 3 场锥形飓风，其行为与她普通超级中的飓风类似。然而，Hypercharged Supers 的射弹速度更快，可以从墙壁上反弹，并且还具有更强的 5 格拉力效果。请注意，射弹从墙壁弹回后，超级会拉向射弹撞击墙壁的位置，而不是拉向米娜的位置。她还获得 20% 的速度提升、5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==提示==

=== 游戏模式和地图 ===

* 在[[Bridge Too Far]]等地图中，米娜可以有效地使用风车。将小工具放在车道的右侧，可以推得更远。
* 在[[Brawl Arena]]中，米娜是一个很好的选择。使用中间车道作为掩护。由于米娜拥有良好的爆发伤害，她既可以在中路确保击杀，也可以快速刺杀过于激进的敌人。

=== 推荐构建 ===

* 当在有利于射手或刺客的地图或游戏模式中玩 Mina 时，Blown Away 通常是更好的 Star Power。如果刺客距离太近，请使用她的超级能力来根除他们，然后通过攻击结束他们。或者，作为替代方案，当刺客被定身时，使用她的攻击在他们之间拉开尽可能远的距离。冲向射手并使用超级来阻止他们逃跑。

===策略===

*米娜的攻击使她朝她当前面对的方向冲去。使用此机制可以逃离困境或在上车道时躲避更多攻击。
**但是，攻击时要小心米娜面对的方向。错误的方向可能会让你最终出现在[[Bull]]、[[Griff]]、[[Shelly]]、[[Spike]]、[[Darryl]]或[[Leon]]面前。
**当面对这样的争吵者时，你可以在攻击前短暂停顿，选择不冲刺，因为米娜在站立不动时不会冲刺。
*由于米娜的攻击3有0.5秒的结束时间，在此期间使用风车可以帮助该技能不被人群控制射弹打断。
*由于米娜的完整连击攻击需要太多时间才能落地，因此在使用她的超级后立即完成凉鞋动作。当敌人落地时，米娜可以立即造成高额伤害。
*当你遇到[[Colt]]、[[Mico]]和[[Pam]]等具有偷弹药能力的敌人时要小心，因为米娜需要全部三种弹药才能使用连击，失去其中之一都会使连击变得更加困难。当对手使用他们的能力时尝试使用连击。

===其他===
*请注意，当被米娜的超级击中时，争吵者会被发射到天空，使他们免受地面上任何进一步的攻击。因此，在使用“Capo What？”时不要立即使用第二个 Super。
*由于米娜的超级技能就像拉力一样，在近距离使用它不会拉动敌人，因此不会将敌人送入空中，这使得它对像[[Kit]]和[[El Primo]]这样的斗士毫无用处，他们可以直接跳到你身上并消除任何距离。

==语音线==
Alli:
激活后，阿里超级技能的额外伤害现在为敌人最大生命值的 25%，而不是当前生命值。此外，在超充能期间，即使艾丽没有使用超级技能，她的攻击也会恢复其攻击造成伤害的 20%。阿里还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。此外，超充能伤害提升会增加她的超级的最小和最大额外伤害，以及她的特殊目标伤害。

==提示==
*请记住，阿里只能在灌木丛或水下跳跃，这使得大多数跳跃都是单程旅行。因此，要小心你选择的目标，因为如果事情变得棘手，你可能无法逃脱。
*阿里的攻击技巧使她能够跳过敌人的攻击，这使她可以有效对抗诸如[[埃德加]]和[[健二]]之类的爆发型刺客，他们往往会立即卸下所有弹药。因此，当与这些斗士一起对抗她时，请尽量节省弹药，因为阿里随后的装弹速度非常慢，并且很容易遭到报复。
*阿里缓慢的装弹速度使她无法应对成群的敌人或逃离他们。因此，她在诸如[[单人对决]]等模式的开始阶段表现出色，她可以在组队之前瞄准较弱的斗士，或者他们开始​​收集更多[[对决|能量立方体]]。
**如果可能，请尝试在灌木丛或水域之外重新加载，因为在这些区域中重新加载速度较慢。
*在[[宝石抢夺]]等游戏模式中，尝试靠近场地的对方一侧。对手在生命值较低时通常会试图撤退到那里，以便她能够快速有效地伏击他们。
*由于艾莉的冲刺范围取决于她的速度，请尝试装备速度齿轮以进一步提高它。
*在紧要关头，阿里的超级技能可用于对体积较大的目标造成额外的爆发伤害。然而，这只能在绝望的情况下使用，因为她的移动速度比大多数其他刺客慢，所以她严重依赖它来接近未来的目标。 
*注意阿里的激怒计数器：计数器减少意味着敌人已经开始治疗，而计数器耗尽则意味着已经超过阈值。
*当敌方队伍挤在一起时，尝试使用你的超级：爆发伤害可以让你快速将他们全部击倒，或者至少让你的队友更容易清理。
*如果您使用喂鳄鱼小工具，请尝试在超级伤害加成激活时击中多个敌人并进行攻击，以便增加您的治疗量。
*将你的冷血小工具与你的超级结合使用，特别是当敌人逃跑或你刚刚重生时。这可以让你更快地拉近距离并重新投入战斗。
*理想情况下，攻击当前在灌木丛或水中的争斗者。这些情况可以让你更快地躲避射弹并造成伤害，并且在紧要关头，可以快速摆脱困境。
*尝试呆在靠近草地或水的墙壁附近。这是她最好的战场，让她能够更好地发挥跳跃能力。
*由于她比平常更差的装弹和卸弹速度，艾莉的每一点弹药都非常珍贵，所以尽量不要自动瞄准，除非完全确定你的攻击会击中。

*对抗诸如[[Edgar]]、[[Fang]]、[[Sam]]、[[Mico]]、[[Kenji]]、[[Shade]]、[[Mortis]]、[[Lily]]、[[Alli]]和[[Buzz]]等近距离刺客时，请勿将狼牙棒扔得太远，因为这将导致Lumi因狼牙棒的飞行时间过长而损失宝贵的伤害。相反，以与[[卡尔]]和[[查理]]类似的方式，将狼牙棒射向附近的墙壁以增加你可以投掷的数量。

*她的“打灯小工具”发出的火焰非常有效地限制敌人愿意去的地方，通常会切断他们的逃生路线。
*她的冷酷和霜冻小工具可以覆盖[[热区]]中的区域。她可以利用这一点为自己和团队带来优势，因为敌人无法进入热区，除非减速，否则很快就会被 Lumi 和她的队友轻松击败。
*冷酷和霜冻小工具也可用于对抗某些刺客。如果与像埃德加、[[Kit]]、[[Bonnie]]和[[El Primo]]这样具有跳跃超级和近距离的Brawlers比赛，请确保你没有扔出你的狼牙棒，等待他们跳跃，在他们在空中时走向跳跃点，同时使用小工具，这样它就会留下光滑的霜冻区域，防止他们移动，让你更容易杀死他们。

Clancy:
激活后，克兰西超级的彩弹将刺穿敌人，并在达到最大射程后返回到他身边。然而，如果射弹在返回他身边时接触到墙壁，它们就会消失。返回克兰西时，射弹不会造成伤害缩放。他还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。 

==提示==

*克兰西在比赛开始时几乎毫无用处，因为他在第一阶段的低伤害和机动性严重阻碍了他的表现，所以最好一开始就立即瞄准第二阶段。

**在第三阶段，克兰西几乎是不可阻挡的，他的快速移动速度和毁灭性的超级伤害使他能够控制大范围而不会死亡。
*在[[抢劫]]中，克兰西可能会在第3阶段用一个超级来处理保险箱四分之一的生命值。这使他成为一个极其危险的格斗家，独自一人保管着保险箱，但由于他的超级攻击的蔓延，重要的是要进入近距离射中每一次射击。然而，这对克兰西来说可能是危险的，因为他的生命值相当低，而且在这种游戏模式中通常选择的争吵者都是具有高 DPS 的人，这意味着他甚至可能无法在不死的情况下接近保险箱。
*如果您决定装备快速射击小工具，建议在弹药充足时使用它，以达到最高效率，因为如果您在仍在装弹或根本没有弹药时激活它，那么它的持续时间就会被浪费。在游戏开始时使用它也是一个不错的决定，这样你就可以在游戏后期造成更多伤害。
*克兰西一旦激活就无法调整他的超级方向，如果敌人在他身后，就有可能浪费大量的齐射。确保在超级技能期间跟踪敌人的移动，如果发现自己在敌人面前，请立即重新调整。
**或者，你也可以在远离敌人的中距离使用它，这样你就不太可能错过，并且仍然保证至少 70% 的超级最大伤害。

==芥末能量==
Berry:
激活后，贝瑞的超级会沿着超级的路径创建两条冰淇淋水坑轨迹，而不是一条。超充能的水坑可以与他的主要攻击和普通超级的水坑叠加。他还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==芥末能量==
Lily:
激活后，莉莉的超级会从墙壁上弹起，击中敌人后，会将莉莉传送到被击中的敌人处，并将两人传送到暗影领域，持续 5 秒，与其他玩家隔离。弹丸速度也大幅提升。与[[Rico]]和[[Ruffs]]的主要攻击类似，莉莉的超级在前5次弹跳中将获得3.33格的额外射程。如果莉莉投掷她的超充能超级然后使用她的消失小工具，她将消失在暗影领域三秒，但如果超级击中敌人，持续时间将刷新并从 5 秒开始倒计时，莉莉将传送到击中的敌人处。

在暗影领域，与[[Cordelius]]的超级类似，屏幕上会出现倒计时，敌方斗士可以使用他们的主要攻击，但他们都不能使用他们的超级、小工具或超充能。 5秒后，或者如果莉莉或她的敌人被击败，他们将不再处于暗影领域，倒计时将停止。暗影领域的环境会发出紫色调，而莉莉和她的敌人会发出粉紫色调。即使她的特质半径可见，莉莉也无法在她的暗影领域以任何方式给她的超级能量。她的对手也无法对他们的超级进行冲锋，除非他们具有允许他们在受到伤害时冲锋的特质，例如[[Jacky]]、[[El Primo]]、[[Bull]]、[[Frank]]、[[Rosa]]、[[Hank]]、[[Trunk]]、[[Ollie]]或[[Draco]]。两个英雄的盟友都可以看到他们在正常环境中的等效位置。她还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==芥末能量==
Draco:
激活后，如果德拉科处于替代形态，他的攻击范围增加 3.33 格，射弹量加倍，并且德拉科在攻击时不消耗弹药。就像莱昂的超充能和超级一样，如果德拉科的超充能持续时间在仍处于龙独奏形态时结束，他的充气将再次像以前一样喷出常规火焰。 Draco 还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==突变==
Kit:
激活后，当基特对敌人的斗士使用他的超级时，他会击晕敌人，同时仍然能够移动和攻击。然而，随着时间的推移，他将不再对他击中的敌人造成伤害。如果基特对友方格斗者使用他的超级技能，他每秒可以治疗他们最大生命值的 25%，而不是 15%，并且他在替代形式下的攻击范围会显着增加。然而，基特的自愈能力不会是正常情况下的两倍。友方争斗者的治疗效果会在超充能持续时间内增加，并在超充能结束后恢复正常，但攻击的额外范围会一直保持到超充能持续时间结束。套件还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾。

==提示==
*Kit 的 Super 最适合在团队游戏模式中使用，在这种模式下，他可以附着在盟友身上并通过攻击造成巨大伤害，同时还能治愈自己。
*如果敌人的队友在附近，请勿跳向敌人。相反，您可以对孤立的敌人使用超级技能，让您的队友消灭他们，或者对生命值低的敌人使用超级技能来击败他们。
*Kit在[[摊牌]]中是一个不错的选择，虽然他缺乏伤害输出和生命值，但他有大量的机动性和地图控制来弥补这一点。他的权力饥渴之星力量是摊牌的绝佳选择，因为他每获得两个能量立方体就算作三个，因此他比其他人更快地获得更强大的力量。他在[[双人对决]]中表现更好，因为他可以治愈队友，在刀枪不入的情况下控制和伤害敌人，并获得双倍能量立方增益。他的纸板箱小工具也很有用，因为它可以让他加快超级充电速度、偷袭敌人或逃离敌人。
*请注意，如果对当前在超级中移动的敌人使用Kit的超级，例如[[Buzz]]、[[Fang]]、[[Chuck]]、[[Berry]]、[[Darryl]]或[[Bull]]，Kit的超级将被取消，Kit甚至会被拉动并遭受超级的后遗症。因此，当这些争斗者预期使用他们的超级技能时，尽量不要瞄准他们，从而给你带来惊喜。
*如果在一轮重置时Kit附在队友身上，他将在下一轮开始时拥有他的超​​级。这使得基特可以利用他的纱线球攻击来保证击倒，而不必担心浪费他的超级。

===策略===
*Kit 对于 [[Draco]]、[[Frank]]、[[Hank]]、[[El Primo]]、[[Bull]] 或 [[Darryl]] 等坦克非常强大，因为 Kit 可以使用他的芝士汉堡小工具立即治愈大量生命值，并在附加时造成大量伤害。套件还可以加班为附带的队友恢复大量生命值。

Mico:
激活后，Mico 的下一个超级技能会击晕受到其冲击伤害的敌人 1.5 秒。他还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==提示==
*谨慎使用你的跳跃。 Mico 的装弹速度非常慢，因此在使用攻击进行机动时要避免浪费太多弹药。尽量不要耗尽你所有的弹药，而是根据目标的攻击时机来进行攻击。
*为了优化剪辑尖叫小工具的使用，请在使用前直接跳到对手身上，确保所有 3 个射弹命中。虽然这个小工具的缓慢应该可以为你赢得逃跑的时间，但请确保保留至少 1 颗弹药来逃跑。
*你还可以使用米科的剪辑尖叫来减慢试图追击你的近战乱斗者的速度，让你不必使用他的主要攻击来跳开。
*与其他 Micos 交战时，最好自动瞄准它们上方以造成伤害。这是因为许多Mico对抗很可能会导致双方同时试图攻击对方，因此，最好在最后一秒闪避并攻击对手。
*请记住，Mico 的超级技能在锁定时会减慢速度，因此请在攻击前尝试将目标英雄逼入角落。
* Mico 的生命值不是很高，执行超级技能的 1 秒延迟使他很容易被击败。因此，请利用 6 秒延迟并在跟踪目标之前使用超级掩体。
*由于Mico在超级期间的长时间播放，他可以像宝石抢夺中[[Janet]]的超级一样使用它，在倒计时期间逃离对手并在空中恢复。
*与刺客交战时，确保你至少有一枚弹药可以释放。这是因为，米科缺乏任何真正的选择来造成高爆发伤害或恢复生命值，这意味着如果没有他的剪辑尖叫小工具，米科无法有效逃脱，很可能会被击败。
*由于 Mico 的伤害半径较小，可以训练预测敌人的行动，将敌人围成更小的包袱，或者使用更注重伏击的战斗方式。后一种风格最适合与他的猴子商业明星力量搭配，因为它可以防止装弹缓慢的斗士进行反击，尤其是在与其他斗士对抗之后。
*由于Mico的Super在空中停留时间较长，使用Hypercharge后立即使用Super会导致Hypercharge浪费。与其他超级充能相比，超级充能的影响较小，因此使用超级充能作为攻击的纯粹统计增益是一个好主意。降落在对手身上，然后激活超级充能来快速击败他们是一个不错的策略。
*与其他具有类似攻击增强条的斗士不同，Mico 的 Monkey Business 条无论他是否攻击都会充电。因此，建议 Mico 玩家在槽满后尽快进行攻击，这样当 Mico 在攻击过程中充电时，可能会导致团队被消灭。
*Mico 的攻击伤害是在跳跃结束前一帧造成的，这使他免受 [[Jacky]] 的反击粉碎、[[Nani]] 的返回发送者或 [[Meg]] 的重金属星之力等立即伤害报复。这也适用于击退，这意味着 Mico 可以伤害试图隐藏在 [[Gale]] 的 Twister Gadget 内的敌人。
*与[[Buzz]]的储备浮标小工具类似，Presto可以用作击杀确认选项，比剪辑尖叫更有效地抵消Mico的短距离，因为Mico的主要攻击造成更多伤害。然而，与大多数增强 Brawlers 主要攻击的小工具不同，Presto 上方没有显示小工具符号，这使得它几乎在任何时候都是一个很棒的惊喜选择。
*使用记录粉碎星力，Mico 可以对 [[Heist]] 保险箱和 Power Cube 盒子造成巨大伤害。
*如果您要使用猴商星力，请在进度条填满之前使用一次攻击，这样您就可以接近敌人并激活您的弹药窃取能力，这将弥补您用于接近敌人的弹药。或者，您可以使用 Presto Gadget。
*不要对抗那些能够以非常快的卸载速度造成持续伤害的敌人，例如[[卡尔]]或[[吉吉]]，因为每当有人靠近他们时，他们就会分别使用他们的超级和攻击造成伤害，所以不可能使用跳跃功能来躲避他们的攻击，因为只要米科在地面上，他们就会造成伤害。

==语音线==
Larry & Lawrie:
激活后，Larry 会生成第二个 Lawrie，生命值增加 2000 点。此 Lawrie 始终相对于 Larry 沿正常 Lawrie 的顺时针方向生成。尽管有这样的描述，第二个劳里与普通劳里相比并没有造成额外的伤害。可以同时有两个活跃的 Lawrie，并且使用另一个普通的 Super 只会使普通的 Lawrie 消失。拉里和劳里的命令：交换和命令：后备小工具仅影响正常的劳里。拉里还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==提示==
=== 游戏模式和地图 ===
*Larry 和 Lawrie 良好的射程、出色的区域控制能力和强大的可生成能力使他们在以长时间控制为优先的模式中表现出色，例如 [[宝石争夺]] 和 [[热区]]。

=== 推荐构建 ===
*命令：后退小工具最适合用作更具战术性的移动用途，无论您是在 [[淘汰赛]] 还是 [[摊牌]] 中。如果你向敌人生成你的双胞胎兄弟劳瑞，考虑到你是主要目标，他们可能会表现得不那么激进。因此，你可以根据合适的对手交换位置，并出其不意地快速攻击他们。这在紧张的情况下非常有用。
*不建议使用“交换小工具”命令，因为虽然劳里可以很好地利用拉里的自动售票机，但收到劳里的震动器会削弱拉里的远距离和伤害。这使得拉里在对抗敌方投掷者和中距离乱斗者时基本上毫无用处，例如[[Pearl]]、[[Surge]]、[[Emz]]、[[Tara]]、[[Nita]]和[[Spike]]，而且武器的低伤害意味着他甚至很难击落近距离的乱斗者。
*协议：保护对于防御 [[Fang]]、[[Bull]]、[[Shelly]]、[[Darryl]]、[[Rosa]] 或 [[El Primo]] 等侵略性近战乱斗者非常有用，这使得击倒他成为一项艰巨的任务。对抗区域伤害的近战英雄，如 [[Kenji]]、[[Kit]]、[[Shade]]、[[Mico]]、[[Mortis]]、[[Edgar]]、[[Ash]]、[[Bibi]]、[[Jacky]]、[[Hank]]、[[Sam]]、[[Doug]]、[[Draco]]、[[Lily]] 和[[Buzz]]，你和Lawrie之间保持一定的距离，以确保Lawrie不会因为他们的攻击而受到更大的伤害。
*协议：协助非常有效，特别是与命令：后退配合使用时。当你靠近劳里并造成伤害时，星力会提高你的装弹速度，你可以持续攻击，同时在你使用命令：后退时互相治疗并交换位置。由于拉里的装弹速度较慢，建议使用星力提升装弹速度，同时造成大量伤害。

===其他===
*为了最大限度地提高伤害，请尝试瞄准敌人前方。这是因为拉里的攻击会爆炸两次，所以这会增加你的攻击对敌人造成两次伤害的机会。 
*瞄准前方也有好处，因为拉里的射弹速度相当慢，所以瞄准前方会增加击中敌人的机会。 
*尝试在靠近敌人的地方产卵Lawrie，或者如果可能的话，在灌木丛中产卵。这将防止敌人轻松或快速地摧毁他，这将使你最大限度地发挥他的伤害潜力。 
*有时，玩家会误认为劳里为玩家（与[[莱昂]]的克隆投影仪小工具类似），这可能会分散他们的注意力和/或导致他们浪费弹药。
*劳里可以充当肉盾，特别是与协议：保护星力配对时。

Maisie:
When activated, Maisie's Super also sends out 6 main attack projectiles radially. Similar to [[Spike]]'s attack and [[Hank]]'s Super, the pattern is fixed, with 60 degrees between each cloud, and it doesn't rotate with the direction Maisie is moving. The projectiles deal as half as much damage but recharge the same amount of Super on hit as her Super. Maisie's Hypercharge deals devastating damage at point-blank range where more clouds and her Super can hit the enemy. She also gains a 20% speed boost, as well as a 5% damage and shield boost.

==Tips==
===Game Modes and Maps===
*In certain game modes, controlling the bushes can provide a significant advantage. As a long-range Brawler, you can keep enemies at bay by shooting into bushes and denying them access to key areas. This method is effective in areas such as [[Hot Zone]] and Gem Grab.
*Maisie is a solid pick in Brawl Ball. Her Super, combined with her Tremors Star Power and Disengage! Gadget, can make the enemy drop the ball, push them away from the goal, stun them briefly, slow them, or provide area control if the enemies are grouping up together to defend their goal. This makes her a highly versatile Brawler in the mode; her very fast Super charge rate and high damage output allows her to eliminate enemies quickly if they're fired accurately.
*Maisie can take out a large and consistent amount of damage from the enemy's safe in [[Heist]]. Since the safe is a stationary object, her shots are guaranteed to hit. She can deal 11480 damage with three ammo and a super, and if there are multiple defending enemies in range, she could potentially chain Supers and repeatedly take out the enemy's safe's health. Her reload speed is quite reasonable, and her damage is consistent. Maisie's Super is great for defense as well, as it pushes enemies away from the safe and slows them down if she has her Tremors Star Power equipped, allowing her to take out the enemy and potentially chain another Super.

===Recommended Build===
*If you're in a match facing an assassin, use Disengage! to stun them and dash away if they get too close to you. If you're facing any tanks, then use the Finish Them! gadget. A good tip would be to first attack them once or twice, then activate Finish Them! to wipe out their health.
*Maisie's Tremors Star Power is the better option for most situations, as it allows you to hit more consistent shots on your enemies after using your Super. Moreover, using her Super with this Star Power provides a much better area control than her regular Super, as it forces your opponents to retreat.

===Strategies===
*A trick to use with her Super is to activate it, then use Disengage! to dash onto an enemy. With her Tremors Star Power, this should catch the enemy by surprise, and if they are on low health, it is easier to finish them off with her attack.

===Other===
*Never auto-aim your shots when using Maisie, unless your opponent is right in front of you, as with the starting slow projectile speed, it most likely won't work.
*When aiming your Super as Maisie, try to corner brawlers into walls and activate your Super as you walk towards them. This will make it so that your Super hits accurately and you can cycle it back quickly thanks to a limited area available for your enemies to run.
*Maisie can defend herself well against close-range Brawlers, try to use this to your advantage by either dashing away or pushing back close-range Brawlers that sneak up on you like [[Mortis]], [[Edgar]], [[Buzz]], [[El Primo]], [[Fang]], [[Kit]], or [[Mico]]. With the added slow from her Tremors Star Power, you can also efficiently charge her Super, due to the enemies being slowed.
*Maisie struggles against long-range Brawlers like [[Piper]], [[Nani]], [[Brock]], [[Colt]], [[Rico]], [[Mandy]], or [[Bea]], but once Maisie can get in range, she can easily take them out. A good way to get in range, is to try and predict the shot of your enemy, dodge it, while also slowly moving closer to them.
*Maisie's Super is excellent for crowd control and pushing back enemies. Use it strategically in tight situations or to clear the area around an objective, such as the Gem Mine in [[Gem Grab]] or the [[Brawl Ball]] goal.
*Since Maisie's main attack is very easy to dodge, you should shoot multiple attacks in quick succession to increase the chance of a hit. Since Maisie's attack deals a lot of damage, one hit gives a lot of value. Do not shoot someone from afar when you only have one ammo unless they are in a very tight spot  and cannot dodge your attack or slowed/stunned.
*With a limited ammo capacity, it's very important that you make every shot count. Avoid spamming her main shots at random and try to land shots consistently to make sure you hit an opponent. Even though Maisie has a fast unload speed, its still important to make sure you land your shots and focus on aspects such as timing.
*Maisie can work well with Brawlers that provide healing, especially portable healing like [[Byron]], [[Doug]], [[Pam]], [[Berry]], or [[Poco]] to help her even more against sneak attacks. This allows her to stay in the battle longer and maintain map control.

*在[[宝石抢夺]]和[[赏金]]等更具支持性的游戏模式中使用他的实用腰带小工具。巴斯特的慢动作重播小工具在更具侵略性的模式中更加方便，例如[[Brawl Ball]]，他可以解除持球者的武装。

==提示==
===游戏模式和地图===

*奥蒂斯可以使用他的休眠之星小工具来封锁[[热区]]和[[争吵球]]中的阻塞点，并防止敌人使用他们的能力。这可以在 [[Parallel Plays]] 和 [[Backyard Bowl]] 等地图中使用。一种方法是将超级瞄准你球门附近的阻塞点，这样当持球的敌人触发它时，他们就无法射门，他们唯一的选择就是走进球门，为你的球队赢得一点时间来阻止球门。
*他的超级技能可以阻止敌人在乱斗球和[[篮球乱斗]]中传球。这可以是防止敌人有效进球的有用方法，对于像 [[Stu]]、[[Melodie]]、[[Kenji]] 和 [[Mortis]] 这样使用超级和冲刺得分的斗士非常有用。
*奥蒂斯是[[抢劫]]中的疯狂防守者，因为当[[El Primo]]、[[Bull]]、[[Edgar]]、[[Buzz]]、[[Darryl]]和[[Fang]]等仇恨斗士接近保险箱时，他可以通过静音然后杀死他们来阻止他们。他还可以静音[[Jessie]]的炮塔、[[Penny]]的大炮、[[Larry & Lawrie|Lawrie]]、[[Tara]]的克隆体和[[Nita]]的熊，这些对保险箱来说可能是巨大的威胁。作为一名罪犯，奥蒂斯凭借他的墨水补充星力和飞溅小工具的配对，可以对保险箱造成高额伤害。
*在像[[Snake Prairie]]这样的茂密地图中，奥蒂斯的小工具飞溅物与模板胶相结合可以覆盖很多灌木丛，并且可以在奥蒂斯超级开启的情况下看到敌人4秒。

===推荐构建===

*休眠之星通常是最糟糕的小工具，因为当它被触发时，奥蒂斯和他的盟友通常距离不够近，无法真正跟进超级。然而，由于它能够一次多次放置，它可以使其成为一个强大的阻塞点拦截器，其持续时间比飞溅物长得多，在某些事件（例如争吵球和[[抢劫]]）中阻碍敌人的进展。
* Phat Splatter 通常是更好的小工具，因为它可以用来封锁检查站并对保险箱造成损坏。与他的墨水补充星力配合，他可以极快地对保险箱造成大量伤害。
* 墨水补充是使用奥蒂斯所必需的，可以大大提高他的 DPS 和超级充电率。它通常可以用额外的伤害弹丸来终结格斗者。
* 模板胶是最糟糕的明星力量，因为在奥蒂斯使用他的超级后，大多数争吵者会在 3 次攻击中死亡，并且在大多数情况下是不必要的，因为它只会因静音而产生额外的毒害伤害。
* 奥蒂斯的飞溅小工具的伤害范围比他的基本攻击稍大一些，有时甚至可以击中墙后的敌人。用它来消灭稍微超出你射程的敌人。

===策略===
*奥蒂斯的超级能力使他成为坦克和刺客的强大反击者，如果他们离他太近的话。
*奥蒂斯的飞溅小工具的伤害范围比他的基本攻击稍大一些，有时甚至可以击中墙后的敌人。用它来消灭稍微超出你射程的敌人。
*尝试用你的超级近距离攻击你的对手，因为它可以帮助奥蒂斯更快地击败敌人，并确保你不会错过任何攻击。
*他的攻击具有令人难以置信的大范围和命中范围，可用于戳敌人并阻止他们治疗。
*特别是如果你要对抗刺客，请尽量时刻准备好你的超级技能。与[[格斯]]类似，奥蒂斯可以轻松阻止他们造成伤害并快速杀死他们。
*Cil 也可以压制某些特殊目标。当对抗 Hyperbear 或 Hyperscrappy 时，使用它来对抗他们可能是一个不错的选择，特别是如果他们拥有明星力量和小工具。
Sam:
激活后，山姆的指关节克星在投掷和返回时都会移动得更快。投掷它们时，超级充能率会增加三倍，这会在对敌人造成伤害时立即为他的超级充能。山姆还获得 20% 的速度提升，以及 5% 的伤害和护盾提升。

==提示==

===游戏模式和地图===
*山姆的特质使他在[[Brawl Ball]]中非常有用，因为他在比赛开始时超级充能，除非他使用他的超级，否则他可以用它来拿球并准备好超级踢。

===推荐构建===
*山姆的磁场小工具使他的区域控制能力变得超级惊人，例如，当敌人在[[热区]]聚集在一起时，他可以激活该小工具；然后轻松杀死他们。
*山姆的脉冲排斥小工具对于区域控制也非常有用，因为他可以让敌人离开某个地点，就像[[宝石抓取]]中的宝石产卵一样，没有太大困难。脉冲排斥剂也适用于近距离战斗。通过向被钉在墙上的敌人投掷指关节克星，将他们击退。
*山姆的丰盛恢复之星力量可以在有很多墙的地图中改变游戏规则，山姆可以用它来扔指关节破坏者，然后立即抓住它们。多次重复这个过程将使山姆在战斗后几秒钟内恢复健康。
*山姆的远程充电星力可以帮助山姆在开放地图或无法正常获取的情况下取回他的指节克星。

===其他===
*当山姆用他的指关节克星攻击时，他会击中两次，首先击中攻击锥体范围的最左边，然后击中最右边。在他周围逆时针移动可以有效地使他的一次攻击落空，因此为了反击——为了使两拳都落地——不要站得太靠近敌人，并在敌人周围顺时针移动。
*由于山姆的弹药在没有指关节克星的情况下充电速度更快，因此在取回他的指关节克星之前尝试重新装填他的所有弹药。
*由于山姆在开始游戏时他的超级技能已经充满电，并且在使用它后会给他带来短暂的速度提升，因此他可以在游戏开始时使用他的超级技能来到达地图的特定部分或比其他[[:类别:Brawlers|Brawlers]]更快地到达特定的东西，例如宝石矿，蓝色[[赏金]]星等。但是要小心，因为将你的指关节克星扔到靠近敌人的地方可能会使他们难以攻击收集。因此，由于 Showdown 地图中有大量空间，该策略在 [[Showdown]] 中效果最佳。
*如果山姆的指关节克星的终点是水，则它们的射程不会扩大，因此可能无法手动收集它们。将它们扔到水体周围时要小心，因为不小心将指关节克星扔进足够大的水体中将迫使山姆在没有它们的情况下战斗，直到他能召回它们，这极大地阻碍了他的伤害输出并使他的小工具毫无用处。如果水的位置靠近敌人，则可以使用他的远程充电星力来部分补救。

Lou:
When activated, whenever Lou drops his Super, any enemy near the landing spot gets their Frost Meter set to 100%, instantly stunning them. However, this Hypercharge doesn't take effect on the currently active Super. He also gains a 20% speed boost, as well as a 5% damage and shield boost.

==Tips==

=== Game Modes and Maps ===

* Lou's Frost can freeze the enemy team, in which when playing certain 3v3 modes like [[Gem Grab]], it can give Lou and his team an advantage. In Gem Grab, he can freeze the enemy Gem Carrier, and the Gem Carrier will be prone to defeat. With his Super (on the Gem mine) and his Supercool Star Power, it will become riskier for the enemy team to collect Gems while allowing Lou and his allies to collect Gems with ease because enemies are more vulnerable to being stunned and defeated while on the Gem mine.
*His Super can completely cover zones in [[Hot Zone]]. He can use this to his and team's advantage as enemies can't enter the hot zones without slowing down and being quickly defeated with ease from Lou and his teammates.
*Lou can be powerful in [[Brawl Ball]]/[[Basket Brawl]]/[[Trophy Thieves]]/[[Hold the Trophy]] because his attack stuns enemies, making them drop the ball/trophy with 3 shots. His Super can be used to deny access to the ball/trophy, hampering enemies from retrieving it due to them slipping if they attempt to do so.
*In Special Events such as [[Boss Fight]], [[Robo Rumble]] or [[Super City Rampage]], similarly to [[Bibi]], Lou can apply Frost and stun the robots/Boss/Mega Monster and cancel out an attack being performed, and with Lou's fast reload speed and unload speed, he can do this consistently. With his Super, he can also slow the respective enemies down, as it'll struggle to move or launch an attack. These few extra seconds from stunning the Boss can affect the outcome of the match drastically.
**It's also a good strategy to save your ammo for the Boss's lasers and charges in Boss Fight, an angry Mega Monster in Super City Rampage, or when your teammate is in danger of being defeated by either of the above enemies. You can use your Supercool Star Power and Cryo Syrup Gadget as well to get a quick stun on the Boss/monster. In any case, this allows your teammates to heal up and get back to the fight. However, try not to wait too long for the right moment to stun the Boss/Monster as, with all ammo reloaded, you will be wasting valuable time you can be using dealing extra damage to the enemy, and every second is crucial in these game modes.
*Lou is also useful in [[Siege]], as the stunning method also works when defending or offending. He can stun the enemy Siege Robot and prevent it from moving. He can also stun the enemy IKE, allowing teammates to destroy the IKE with ease. In addition, on maps that have obstacles in the middle lane of the IKE zone, Lou's Super can be used to trap the Siege Robot in the obstacle until his Super runs out.
*Despite his stuns being ineffective against the Boss, Lou is still decent in [[Big Game]] as a Hunter because he can keep dealing damage to the Boss with his long range, fast reload speed, Super, and reliable damage. He is more useful as the Big Boss, as he can repeatedly stun the Hunters and prevent them from attacking him. He can also use his Super to slow down grouped-up enemies. Coupled with his fast reload speed, his attacks, and his Super, he can prove devastating to the Hunters.

=== Recommended Build ===

* Lou should use his Ice Block Gadget mainly to avoid high-damaging projectiles, like the Supers of [[Nani]], [[Tick]], [[Mandy]], and [[Dynamike]], or the potentially deadly long-range projectiles of the Boss in Boss Fight if Lou or his teammates are low on health and need to escape, or if Lou is the last teammate alive, and not to use it with low-damaging projectiles or melee attacks, because he is immobile during the Gadget's usage.
*Lou's Ice Block Gadget can also be used very effectively against ambushers like heavyweights such as [[Bull]], [[El Primo]], and [[Darryl]], and assassins such as [[Leon]], [[Buzz]], and [[Edgar]], because these Brawlers rely on their burst damage and will therefore unload their attacks very quickly and at once. When you are ambushed by such Brawlers, use your Gadget the moment they start attacking. They will waste all their ammo on you while you take no damage, and if the Brawler doesn't reload very fast (which is most of such Brawlers except El Primo, Frank, Bibi, [[Nita]], [[Rosa]], [[Draco]], and Edgar), you will have an ammo advantage to quickly defeat them or stun them so that you can escape.
*Lou's Frost is already devastating to enemies because it stuns them, but with his Cryo Syrup Gadget and Hypothermia Star Power, Lou can make his Super more deadly as Cryo Syrup can either freeze them instantly, leaving them vulnerable to Lou or teammates, or to increase their Frost high enough such that Hypothermia's damage debuff is significant.
*Lou's Hypothermia Star Power reduces damage dealt by frozen enemies. This also works on Boss Fight Robots, and Big Game Bosses, effectively increasing his team's survivability.
*Using Lou's Ice Block gadget is little to none use when facing stun attacks such as [[Frank]]'s and Buzz's Super, [[Dynamike]]'s Satchel Charge Gadget, [[Fang]]'s Roundhouse Kick Gadget, and [[Bo]]'s Snare a Bear Star Power as it stuns you afterwards.

=== Strategies ===

* When escaping an enemy Lou's Super, if possible, it's almost always better to turn lightly, up to 90 degrees, instead of making a U-turn as the deceleration would be limited by Lou's Super.

=== Other ===
*Since his Super makes enemies slow down and makes maneuvering harder, enemies will attempt to escape by moving in the same direction, which makes attacks easier to hit and enemy movement to be predictable. With his Supercool Star Power, this is better justified and is more frivolous to enemies, because if they're stacked with the attacks and Super, they'll be quickly stunned and defeated, not to mention they'll also have trouble maneuvering. Additively, the more speed a Brawler has, the more struggle they have changing directions in Lou's Super. This makes Lou an ideal counter to speedy Brawlers like tanks, assassins, and [[Max]].
*Lou has a great synergy with Edgar and other close-ranged Brawlers. Lou can stun and slow the enemies with his attack and Super (more effective with his Supercool Star Power), and the respective close-ranged Brawler can jump onto or ambush the affected enemies and quickly defeat them.
*Lou can stun enemies easily with 3 shots, which is useful in [[Showdown]], [[Duo Showdown]], [[Bounty]], or [[Lone Star]], because he can quickly defeat enemies or quickly escape if he's in danger.
*When fighting Brawlers such as Edgar or El Primo, try to get at least 1/3 of the gauge filled up considering you use Ice Block as soon as Edgar or El Primo jumps, that way Lou's slow unleash speed can freeze the enemy whole.
Jacky:
When activated, her next Super will have enemies pulled in also slowed by 150 points for 1.5 seconds. She also gains a 20% speed boost, as well as a 5% damage and shield boost.

==Tips==
===Game Modes and Maps===
*Due to Jacky's short range, she isn't ideal for extremely open maps such as [[Purple Paradise]] in Bounty, where long-ranged Brawlers will outrange her and fend Jacky off. If playing Jacky on an open map, use her Hardy Hard Hat Star Power because she can rush enemies and dodge their shots, and she can withstand more damage. Her Counter Crush Star Power is less useful since its range won't be enough to defeat long-ranged Brawlers from a range, and is used to engage in close-ranged combat.
*In Showdown, Jacky's circular area damage mechanics along with her high damage is useful in some maps to destroy large groups of Power Cube Boxes in maps like [[Feast or Famine]], [[Dark Passage]], [[Two Thousand Lakes]] and [[Acid Lakes]]. However, since her range is short like other heavyweights, she should prioritize getting Power Cubes and should avoid immediate conflict with other Brawlers.
*In Brawl Ball, if an enemy holding the Ball gets caught in her Super, the Ball drops. This allows teammates to quickly steal the Ball or prevent an enemy from scoring. In addition, Jacky has a high damage output, high health, and a fast movement speed, which is better justified with her Pneumatic Booster Gadget, making Jacky very viable in this event.
*Jacky has the same movement speed as other heavyweights. This means that she can catch up to Brawlers that are escaping from her. If she has her Pneumatic Booster Gadget, this can be useful when chasing other fast Brawlers like Max and assassins, and will help in game modes like [[Brawl Ball]], [[Bounty]] and [[Showdown]]. With her high health as well, she can rush enemies and defeat them easily. However, be wary of slowing Gadgets and Supers like [[Bea]], [[Spike]], [[Lou]], and [[Emz]]'s since they will slow Jacky down, allowing them to outrun Jacky.
*Jacky is amazing in [[Brawl Arena]]. Her levels scales very quickly, allowing her to quickly attack and corner brawlers with less damage from the middle, defeating them with ease while assisting the lane brawlers in destroying the bots due to her circular attack radius. Not only that, but Jacky also has high health, high damage output with her Counter Crush Star Power and high mobility with her Pneumatic Booster Gadget, making her extremely dangerous in this mode.

===Recommended Build===
*The quick burst of speed from her Pneumatic Booster Gadget is helpful to position Jacky quickly, escape in dangerous situations or when low on health, hunt enemies down, or secure vital items like Bolts in [[Siege]] or Gems in [[Gem Grab]].
*Using Jacky's Rebuild Gadget is risky in normal matches, because it could result in neither team being able to break walls, effectively resulting in Jacky entering a match without a functional Gadget. However, this risk is eliminated if she is supported with teammates that can break walls, in Power Matches, where the chances of finding opponent that can break walls is higher, or in game modes with an overtime like Brawl Ball.
*Due to the spammable nature of her Pneumatic Booster Gadget, it pairs very well with the Gadget Cooldown Gear. This will allow her to boost her speed for many more opportunities within a match, and allow for more plays based on mobility.
*Jacky's Counter Crush Star Power increases her offensive potential, allowing her to deal significantly more damage and eliminate targets with higher health. Due to her slow reload speed, this Star Power ends up being the preferred option, since it allows Jacky to easily defeat short-range assassins like [[Mortis]], [[Edgar]], [[Kenji]], and [[Fang]]. However, be careful with tanks like [[Bull]], [[Rosa]], Draco, and [[Darryl]], as the four possess shield abilities that reduce the effectiveness of Counter Crush.

===Strategies===
*Jacky can use her Super to pull in enemies before using her attack since she requires to be close to enemies to damage them. Note that her ammo won't recharge during her Super, so make sure to reload all your ammo before you use her Super. Jacky's Super can also be used to interrupt potentially dangerous Supers (like [[Carl]]'s or [[Frank]]'s), or to drag away enemies from the goal in Brawl Ball to her. Pairing her with a Brawler that deals area damage is very effective when you use her Super, like [[Dynamike]] or [[Brock]]. First, pull the enemies in with your Super. Then, the other Brawler can attack the pulled in enemies with their Super, dealing massive damage and leading to a potential team-wipe, which can be devastating to enemies.
*It is possible to secure a goal in [[Brawl Ball]] using Jacky's Super. First, hold the ball and aim it towards the goal. When an enemy tries to defend, pass the ball quickly and use the Super afterwards. The enemy Brawler will be unable to hold the ball, causing it to pass right past them and into the goal.
*Jacky has excellent synergy with mobility supports like [[Gray]] and [[Max]], as both can use their Supers to facilitate Jacky's approach, allowing her to catch enemies off guard and take them down, which could even lead to the complete elimination of a team.

===Other===
*Jacky's short range limits her offensive capabilities, but she has enough range to attack enemies that are at most a tile behind walls, which she can use to her advantage by attacking enemies behind walls. This strictly limits throwers that can otherwise take cover behind walls.
*Jacky is prone to absorbing a lot of damage. Be careful not to absorb too much damage and fuel the enemies' Super, as well as becoming an easy target in case you position yourself poorly. Use surrounding walls to pressure enemies with your presence. 
*Jacky's attack circles around her, which means that she can attack behind her, so if an enemy approaches you from behind, you can still hit them, as long as they are close to you. However, keep in mind that her attack is instantaneous, so you cannot run to extend your range.
*Jacky's attack is unique; auto-aiming or manually aiming renders the same attack direction and range. Because of this, players can focus on other aspects of the match such as dodging attacks and positioning, although players can still aim to see the attack range when they need to. This is especially useful with her Super, in this case try to drag the joystick to know if the enemy is in your Super range or not.
*Jacky, despite being a tank, can't outmatch other tanks. This is because she reloads rather slowly and doesn't deal enough damage to eliminate such Brawlers with three ammos. Since all other heavyweights reload faster and/or deal more damage than her (like Bull, [[El Primo]], Frank, Rosa, [[Draco]], or Darryl), she can neither defeat heavyweights in three shots nor can she reload fast enough to get a fourth one before getting eliminated. When facing Bull, [[Shelly]], [[Griff]], [[Spike]], Rosa, [[Leon]], [[Nani]], [[Buzz]], El Primo, or Darryl, try to stay out of their range as much as possible while attacking them. Using your Pneumatic Booster Gadget to escape from them is also possible. However, with her Counter Crush Star Power, she can deal massive damage in short periods that her main attack alone wouldn't be able to deal, helping a lot in some interactions.
*Jacky should focus on picking on low to medium health Brawlers or low-damaging and slow-reloading ones. If a Brawler reloads slower or deals less damage, Jacky can eliminate them easily as she has high health and can withstand three to five of their shots. In addition, make sure that the enemy has exhausted all their ammo so you can get close to them without taking major damage from being out-ranged.
*Remember that Jacky does have a 1.8 second reload speed, so after attacking or defeating an enemy, you would want to stay out of the battle and heal up or reload your ammo, instead of going too aggressive on enemies.

Nani:
When activated, Peep grows in size the further he travels, growing up to twice the size by the time the Super runs out. This does not increase Peep's explosion radius. Nani also gains a 20% speed boost, as well as a 5% damage and shield boost.

==Tips==
===Game Modes and Maps===
*Because of the large spread of her attack, Nani is best used in very open maps. Playing her in open maps would minimize any collisions of the projectiles hitting a wall that would decrease her damage. In addition, open maps minimize any accidental cases of Nani's Super being wasted on a wall.
*Nani's high damage per ammo makes her an excellent choice in [[Heist]]. Unlike [[Spike]], [[Griff]], and [[Leon]], she can utilize her attacks from a distance to hit the safe, allowing her to play more safely.

===Recommended Build===
*Nani's Warpin' Time Gadget can be used to reach the enemy safe in [[Heist]], enemy's territory in [[Trophy Thieves]], and the Ball in [[Brawl Ball]] more quickly.
*Do not use the Return To Sender Gadget when you are using the Tempered Steel Star Power especially when it is activated, as the Star Power would decrease the amount of the damage Nani receives, the effectiveness of the Gadget will be reduced significantly.
*Try not to activate her Return To Sender Gadget when you are near to a Brawler which shoots multiple low damage projectiles, such as [[Colt]], [[Rico]], [[Pearl]], Pam, [[8-Bit]], [[Lola]], etc. You will only return a little bit of damage to the enemy Brawler if you use this Gadget against an enemy like this. Only use it when you're going to take one-time high damage, such as [[Brock]]'s rocket, [[Mandy]], [[Tick]], and [[Dynamike]]'s Super, another Nani's Super, a far-ranged [[Piper]]'s bullet, a supercharged [[Bea]]'s shot, or a fully charged [[Angelo]]'s arrow. This requires some practice and fast reflexes but if utilized well, it can be game-changing. If you can't properly apply Nani's Return to Sender Gadget in adequate time, you can use it as a temporary 80% shield for one projectile.
*Tempered Steel is extremely strong in [[Super City Rampage]] and [[Siege]] as she can take a lot of hits from the Mega Monster or robot, and she can take even more when a Brawler like [[Pam]], [[Poco]], [[Doug]], [[Berry]], or [[Byron]] is healing her.
*Tempered Steel essentially quintuples her health, allowing her to escape or hide when coupled with Warpin' Time, such as in [[Big Game]]. Overall, Nani's Super puts her in a very vulnerable position, but the shield provides enough value to deter enemies. Not bursting Nani down completely during its duration allows her to potentially two-shot enemies near her without fear of repercussions.

===Strategies===
*Nani, having very high damage per attack if all orbs hit, and a similarly high damaging Super that can also knock back enemies who get too close, is a very effective tank counter. To make use of this ability, the best way to kill tanks, especially heavyweights, is to maintain a medium range of around 4-5 tiles from the enemy, which allows Nani to hit her shots easier without giving the enemy time to dodge them, while also staying just out of the range of their high damaging attacks. If they get close enough to you, use your Super to knock them back and deal extra damage. Don't be afraid to get close to them, however, if they are low on health, as you can find it hard to kill a skilled dodger at a range.
*Because of Nani's unique attack pattern, her shots can be fired at enemies camping behind walls, although normally only 1 of the 3 orbs will hit an enemy. If possible, you can use the unique diamond path of the two outer orbs to hit an enemy behind a wall.
*To hit enemies accurately with Nani, try to lead your shots slightly ahead of them, meaning if they're walking away from you, you'd shoot slightly above them.

===Other===
*Only auto-aim Nani's attack if the enemy is running directly in front you or if the enemy is standing still; otherwise it will most likely miss. Always try to manually aim your main attack when using Nani.
*Pay attention to enemies with canceling capabilities like knockback, pull, and stun. If Nani is moved from Peep's original casting spot, Peep will disappear. Also note that Peep can't be directly destroyed; however, it can be interrupted by walls, immunity bubbles, pets, etc. When using Nani's Super, wait for the target to either lose their shield or use their pet when going against an enemy with any of these.
*Before using Nani's Super, hide away from any enemies, preferably in bushes, then use her Super. Never use Nani's Super when she's in the middle of a battle, as it leaves Nani vulnerable to enemy attacks. Although this weakness can be alleviated with Nani's Star Power Tempered Steel to shield her, Nani is still vulnerable to being knocked back or stunned which will cause her Super to disappear without exploding.
*Unless within close range of an enemy Brawler, never auto-aim your Super because of the fact that it goes towards the nearest enemy. The direction it will go in may cause you to struggle to control Peep. Try to manually aim your Super so that it starts off in the direction that you want it to go, then control Peep with your movement joystick.
*You can use Nani's Super as an additional attack when you are in close-quarters with a short-ranged Brawler. This can be very useful as hitting enemies with Peep deals damage and knocks back, allowing you to escape or defeat them from a distance.
*Be careful when activating Nani's Hypercharged Super as while it allows you to hit enemies more easily, it also increases the chances of Peep hitting obstacles. Only use this when the map is very open with almost no walls for you to get an easier hit on the enemy.

==突变==
Sandy:
[[File:OtisSuperIcon.png|left|40x40px|link=]]
When activated, Sandy's next Super prevents affected enemies from using any attacks, Supers, Gadgets, or Hypercharges, similar to [[Otis]]' Super, for 0.5 seconds. This Hypercharge doesn't affect passive effects like the [[Gears|Speed Gear]]'s speed boost or [[Bo]]'s Circling Eagle Star Power. This Hypercharge works on spawnables like [[Nita]]'s bear, [[Penny]]'s cannon, or [[Jessie]]'s turret; however, it won't affect passive turrets like [[8-Bit]]'s and [[Pam]]'s turret. For the whole duration, a red, crossed-out symbol will show above the head of the affected target, signifying that this effect is active, and if it hits an enemy Brawler, the affected Brawler's screen will turn a bit dark. This sandstorm will also increase the movement speed of Sandy and his teammates when they are in its range by 200 points (not 20%, despite the description). Sandy also gains a 20% speed boost, as well as a 5% damage and shield boost.

==Tips==
===Game Modes and Maps===

* Sandy's Super is very effective in 3v3 modes because teammates can be positioned stationary while in the vicinity of his Super. His Super allows him and his allies to reach the mode objective, whether it's collecting Bolts in [[Siege]], collecting Gems in [[Gem Grab]], capturing a zone in [[Hot Zone]], and hiding from Hunters as the Boss or sneaking up on the Boss as the Hunters in [[Big Game]].
* Sandy is useful in [[Heist]] and Siege because of his Super, but Sandy isn't too viable in Heist due to his low damage output. Sandy's Star Powers can be used on offense or defense in these events. You can either use Rude Sands to damage the safe/IKE along with you and your allies attacking, or you can use Healing Winds to heal your teammates while attacking because enemies will be attempting to stop you from attacking, and healing is especially useful in Siege because the IKE turret will continuously attack your team. In addition, in Siege, due to Sandy's above-average movement speed and health, he's ideal for obtaining Bolts. You can also use Bolts as bait for close-ranged Brawlers who can stand in his sandstorm near a Bolt, in which they're invisible, and defeat an enemy who attempts to retrieve the Bolt.
* In [[Brawl Ball]], you can use Sandy's Super to cover the ball's vicinity. Use the ball as bait and if an enemy attempts to retrieve it, a close-ranged Brawler such as [[Bull]], El Primo, [[Fang]], or [[Darryl]] could defeat them. After they are defeated, use the time to allow a fast Brawler or self-passer such as [[Melodie]], [[Leon]], [[Max]], [[Mortis]], [[Stu]], [[Mico]], [[Crow]], or [[Edgar]] to kick the ball to the goal. In addition, Sandy has above-average movement speed, therefore making Sandy an ideal ball carrier.

===Recommended Build===

* Sandy's Sleep Stimulator Gadget should be used behind obstacles, in bushes, or around corners to avoid being defeated by enemies since Sandy is vulnerable to damage in this state. Using the Gadget in a sandstorm is also very effective as long as there aren't any enemies scouting the sandstorm.
* Sandy's Sweet Dreams Gadget is very versatile, especially in certain situations. For example, you can use it to quickly escape from an enemy, to push past goal defenders in Brawl Ball to score, to stun the enemies in the zone and get quick capturing, or to even save yourself if a Brawler with a moving ability such as Mico, [[El Primo]], [[Kit]], Crow, [[Surge]], [[Buzz]], [[Chuck]], Mortis, or Edgar uses their ability to rush in and attempt to defeat you.
* A great way to use Sandy's Sweet Dreams Gadget in Duo Showdown is to play with Dynamike with his Satchel Charge Gadget by first hitting the enemy while Dynamike stuns them again with his Gadget. This way, you can get a lot of hits and potentially kill any team in this mode.
* Sandy's Rude Sands Star Power is much better to Healing Winds, as it stops the opponents from auto-healing within the storm. It also works to reveal where enemies are, and with the Vision Gear, can reveal enemies constantly. Healing Winds should be used if Sandy is being used more for support and concealing your teammates from attacks that can wipe them out.

===Strategies===
*When using Sandy's Super, you should place the sandstorm so that it touches the edges of bushes. This allows you and your teammates to use the sandstorm to head into bushes and access larger areas while the enemies believe you and your allies are still inside the sandstorm. Once the sandstorm disappears, the enemies will be confused and you and your allies could possibly ambush them.
*Sandy's wide and piercing attack makes it very effective against grouped-up enemies. Use this to your advantage to charge your Super faster.
*Sandy's Rude Sands Star Power can be used for area control, and while the damage over time is minor, the large radius and long duration prevents healing and can slowly drain the enemies' health if they enter the sandstorm and the area it's placed on, allowing you and your teammates to possibly defeat them or force the enemy to stay far from the area, which is very effective for area control-based events such as Gem Grab and Hot Zone. Sandy's Rude Sands Star Power also counters other Sandy's Supers. If you throw your Super onto their Super, the damage ticks make enemies visible. This makes it much easier for your team to fight against the opposing Sandy. Sandy's Rude Sands Star Power can also be used in maps with an abundance of bushes such as [[Snake Prairie]] or [[Cavern Churn]] to detect bush-camping enemies.

==提示==
===游戏模式和地图===
*使用他的超级技能，达里尔可以在[[灵魂之战]]中通过滚动和射击来对炮塔造成重大伤害，由于他滚动时获得的护盾，因此受到的伤害最小。然而，在队友对护身符生成区域没有足够控制的情况下，他不应该这样做，而应该支持队友收集护身符。
*在[[Brawl Ball]]中，他可以通过向前踢球并使用他的超级滚入并收回球来非常有用。在任何一方得分后，你可以用它从中心取回球，尽管这会让他陷入战斗并可能导致他被击败。你还可以对携带球的敌人使用他的超级，将球从他们的手中击落并将他们击退。这可以用来通过拖延即将得分的敌人来保卫球门。
**请注意，达里尔也是《Brawl Ball》中非常出色的得分手。他可以将球向前和超级投掷两次，从而使他能够跑出很长的距离。如果目标附近没有反击者或者敌方队伍靠近你的目标，那么这是一个很好的策略。

===推荐构建===
*在有很多灌木丛的地图中，使用达里尔的反冲旋转器小工具来侦察该区域。这样你就可以更容易地找到敌人。该小工具对于在[[抢劫]]中攻击安全的敌人也非常有用。将自己定位在保险箱的正中央，并尽快激活小工具，顺时针移动一点，以确保尽可能多的炮弹命中。
*达里尔的钢圈星力可以在多种情况下充当辅助护盾。他可以用它正常地滚到敌人身上，这样他在滚完后攻击敌人时就会受到保护，或者在围攻中使用它来在围攻中攻击 IKE 时保持更长时间的生存。
*达里尔的滚动重装星力让他能够用他的超级武器更轻松地伏击和击败坦克，因为它可以大大增加他的伤害输出。他还可以使用它在抢劫中滚到敌人的安全处并造成极大的伤害。如果你不能用你的超级技能直接击中格斗者，滚动装弹也很方便，让你有可能通过提高装弹速度从更远的地方消灭他们。当你迫切需要冲向某人但没有弹药时，它也会有所帮助。

===策略===
*用达里尔的超级刀锋击中争吵者可以暂时将他们击退，而达里尔可以在他们仍被击退时造成重大伤害。
*如果在滚向对手时时机正确，达里尔的超级可以因击退而取消敌人的超级，就像[[雪莉]]、[[El Primo]]、[[Dynamike]]、[[Surge]]、[[Jacky]]、[[Gene]]或[[Bull]]的超级可以取消[[Frank]]的超级一样。当达里尔（Darryl）准备好超级技能（例如弗兰克）攻击其他英雄时，这会变得很有用。

===其他===
*达里尔的移动速度比大多数其他英雄稍快，因为他是坦克。因此，撤退/接近更容易而且通常更安全。
*他的超级非常适合快速逃离敌人/危险情况或接近敌人，而且达里尔滚动速度极快，并且在滚动时受到保护。还值得注意的是，如果你碰巧在水中翻滚，你可以增加他的翻滚范围。这在逃离敌人时至关重要，因为水可以帮助摆脱困境（在[[Acid Lakes]]或[[Canal Grande]]等地图中）。
*达里尔的超级在密闭区域战斗时可以多次击中（这对于达里尔作为坦克来说是最佳选择）。瞄准他的超级从墙壁上反弹并对敌人造成伤害。
*当近距离面对敌人时，请注意你的位置，不要穿过他们，因为达里尔攻击的第二次射击可能会完全打偏。
*达里尔的主要攻击会造成大量伤害，但伤害并不持续。当用他的超级瞄准某人时，确保他确实滚入他们并击中他们。如果他离得太近，他可能会翻身。如果他距离太远，他可以击中他们，但不会在爆炸范围内。焦油桶的减速效果使他能够在他的超级技能错失几格的情况下追上敌人。

==Tips==

=== Game Modes and Maps ===

*In [[Gem Grab]] or [[Siege]], throwing an attack near a Gem/Bolt can drive enemies away from it, therefore allowing Dynamike or his teammates to retrieve the item more easily and preventing enemies from retrieving it. The same strategy works with Tick.
*In [[Showdown]], if your enemy is near the gas, you can throw your Big Barrel o' Boom to knock them into the gas for them to take extra damage. The Super already deals massive damage, and when with coupled with the gas, it can secure a defeat against low-medium health enemies. Your Demolition Star Power amplifies this strategy's effectiveness.
*With his high-damage attacks, decent range, and ability to attack from behind walls, Dynamike is an excellent choice in [[Heist]]. If he hides safely behind a wall, he can consistently hit the Safe with both of his sticks, even when auto-aiming, and his splash damage may also catch some enemies with it. This is more effective with his Demolition Star Power, as that increases the damage dealt to the Safe.

=== Recommended Build ===
*His Fidget Spinner Gadget is useful for checking bushes because it covers an extremely wide area. He can also use his Gadget to reliably defeat low-health enemies who are very close to him, which would be otherwise very hard to hit with his main attack. His Fidget Spinner Gadget is also useful in [[Heist]] due to the large amount of dynamite it fires, so make sure you move slightly clockwise to maximize its damage.
*Dynamike's attack fuse makes it hard for him to defend. His Satchel Charge Gadget allows him to burst enemies down safely, especially low-health ones. This is also incredibly useful in Heist when attempting to take out heavyweights. His reliance on this Gadget makes it more niche in offense-oriented modes such as [[Bounty]], where stuns are valuable tools to have.
*Dynamike's Dyna-Jump Star Power takes many hours to master but is very rewarding. This Star Power will reduce or eliminate his counters' abilities to counter him. An effective strategy with this is Dyna-Jumping and right before it takes effect, throw a Satchel Charge attack at your enemies to trick them and easily defeat them.
*A moderately difficult but useful strategy is double-jumping with his Dyna-Jump. To do this, throw a shot at your feet and then quickly throw another shot parallel and 1-2 tiles away from the first shot. The first shot will propel you forward and if your timing and position are right, it'll propel you towards the second shot for that shot to propel you. It's much trickier with his Super as you'll have to throw an attack further. Double-jumping will take a lot of practice to master, but it can assist you in many situations and if you master it, you can even triple-jump or quad-jump and avoid getting hit for the while that you're jumping. Though the timing is tricky, it's possible to jump over enemy attacks with Dynamike's Dyna-Jump Star Power. This is rare, but can help in sticky situations when under heavy fire.
*His Dyna-Jump Star Power is effective to escape from danger by throwing dynamite at your feet. This not only damages nearby enemies, but also throws you far enough away from enemies to avoid damage, and allows for a speedy escape over walls. In desperate situations, his Super propels him even further, making it a more reliable tool for escape while also being able to damage and even defeat enemies due to the large amounts of damage dealt by the Super or attack. He can also utilize it to boost him towards vital areas or items such as the zones in [[Hot Zone]].
*Dynamike's Demolition Star Power can be used to fool enemies when they head into enclosed areas that you're in. This especially works with [[Edgar]], [[Mico]], [[Leon]], [[Crow]], [[Mortis]], or [[Surge]] as they don't have wall-breaking abilities, making them unable to escape from his Super.
*Dynamike's Satchel Charge Gadget and Demolition Star Power is a good build for Dynamike. In certain situations, Dynamike can stun enemies and then throw his Super at them. Due to the stun, the enemy won't be able to dodge the Super as people often do nor can they provide counter fire. Demolition deals a lot of damage to the enemy and, coupled with the attack, it'll incinerate out medium-to lower-health Brawlers. For tanks, throw more attacks with the Super to knock them out while they're stunned. Though not necessary, Demolition, if available, should definitely be used because it aids in taking out or heavily damaging Brawlers, especially tanks.
*While Fidget Spinner can be used to check bushes or flee from Assassins, Satchel Charge is almost always better, especially when you have your Super ready and with Demolition equipped. Enemies hit by Satchel Charge have no chance of escaping your Super, and you can easily get a free Super back, or half of your Super if only one enemy is hit.
*Shield and Gadget Cooldown gears are best for Dynamike because his Satchel Charge Gadget takes a long time to recharge, at 23 seconds. He also doesn't have a lot of health and gets easily ambushed by Assassins, so having more HP is beneficial to him. Damage Gear can be used to make your Super more deadly as it will deal 6,660 damage when you're below 50% HP with Demolition equipped, but it's risky to use due to his low health and vulnerability.
*Demolition is usually the better Star Power to use for Dynamike, as it makes his Super more dangerous by increasing its damage to 6,000. However, Dyna-Jump can be used to defend yourself against Tanks or Assassins, as you can fly away when you're close enough to your Super, Hypercharge, or main attack, though it is hard to use this Star Power to its full advantage.

=== Strategies ===
*A difficult but rewarding tactic with Dynamike is where you aim Dynamike's Super and quickly toss a main attack in such a way that Super can push enemies into the sticks of dynamite. This deals extreme amounts of damage to them and usually eliminates them unless they're heavyweights like [[Frank]], [[Bull]], [[Darryl]], [[Draco]], or [[El Primo]]. If the enemy had enough health and the sticks of dynamite were perfectly placed, Dynamike also instantly recharges his Super, in which he can chain Supers.
*Assassins are huge counters to Dynamike due to their above-average speeds and traveling abilities, which help him escape Dynamike's delayed shots, so watch out for them before they can burst you down. Alternatively, if caught by them, you can use Satchel Charge to possibly change the fate of the fight, though this only works if you land the shot correctly or specifically for [[Mortis]] waste his ammo so it's easier to land the shot. You can also use your Fidget Spinner Gadget's speed boost to escape before they get too close to you, but it isn't very useful when they've already reached you because of again, assassins' traveling abilities and fast movement speed.
*If a close-range Brawler is chasing you, throw your dynamites a little ahead of you. This can stop them from following or deal damage. With his Dyna-Jump Star Power, you can also surprise enemies and increase your chances of escaping.
*Hiding behind a wall within a bush in front of it and throwing the dynamite towards the enemy from there can be effective since it's difficult for most other Brawlers to reach you, and they'll be caught by surprise due to you being hidden. This also means that his Satchel Charge Gadget, if activated, will be more likely to hit, which can be devastating towards an opponent and enable Dynamike to easily decimate them.
*Dynamike should not be touching a wall directly when facing a [[Brock]], [[Hank]], [[Squeak]], or [[Jacky]], as their attacks can still hit him despite the wall being in front. It is important to keep a buffer distance from the wall to force them to come closer and attack them from range.
*Dynamike's dynamites can deal massive damage if thrown correctly. Since the dynamite has a delay before blowing up, try predicting the enemy's movement and throwing it where the enemy is likely to be by the time the dynamite detonates. Auto-aiming almost guarantees a miss against moving enemies, but if in a pinch, auto-aiming is more reliable when enemies are farther away. You may also want to throw two pairs of dynamites in succession in two different areas as it's more likely that at least one will hit and still deal a decent amount of damage.
*If there's a [[Meeple]] on your team, have them use their Mansions of Meeple Gadget so you can throw dynamite into the dice towers, blowing up enemies from a safe distance. However, Dynamike's Super will destroy the towers, so refrain from using it unless the walls are about to expire or the enemies will be defeated by it.

=== Other ===
*Try throwing your Super to damage at least two enemies, because as it deals enough damage to charge another Super, allowing you to chain Supers and deal plethoras of damage.
*The spread between Dynamike's dynamites decreases as he throws the sticks closer to himself, making it significantly harder to hit enemies close to him. However, he can also use this to his advantage as such enemies are more likely to be hit by both dynamites and will take more damage.
*Be very careful when using your Super. Since it can break walls, it will remove protective barriers for him, and may inevitably make him more vulrenable to direct attacks. However, he can be more effective at breaking walls than other Brawlers, due to being able to aim at the wall directly regardless of his distance from it.
